parameters.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$healthFile = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'Desktop\rudy-data\health-latest.json'; $markerFile = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'Desktop\rudy-data\boot-notified.txt'; $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $bootTime = $os.LastBootUpTime; $uptime = (Get-Date) - $bootTime; $lastHealthAge = 999; if (Test-Path $healthFile) { $lastHealthAge = ((Get-Date) - (Get-Item $healthFile).LastWriteTime).TotalMinutes }; $alreadyNotified = $false; if (Test-Path $markerFile) { $notifiedBoot = Get-Content $markerFile -Raw; if ($notifiedBoot.Trim() -eq $bootTime.ToString('o')) { $alreadyNotified = $true } }; @{BootTime=$bootTime.ToString('o'); UptimeMinutes=[math]::Round($uptime.TotalMinutes,1); HealthFileAgeMinutes=[math]::Round($lastHealthAge,1); IsRecentBoot=($uptime.TotalMinutes -lt 15); AlreadyNotified=$alreadyNotified; MarkerFile=$markerFile} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$svcs = @('RustDesk','Tailscale','n8n') | ForEach-Object { $s = Get-Service -Name $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($s){\"$_`: $($s.Status)\"}else{\"$_`: NotInstalled\"} }; $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $disk = Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk -Filter \"DeviceID='C:'\"; @{Services=($svcs -join ', '); RAM_Free_GB=[math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1048576,1); Disk_Free_GB=[math]::Round($disk.FreeSpace/1073741824,1)} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"
